member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams
member.summary: The container for all Test Methods parameters (PH).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam
member.summary: The base class for all TestMethods parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam.ParamValue
member.summary: Gets or sets the parameter's value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam)~System.String
member.summary: The implicit cast operator of any parameter to string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.BaseParam.ToString
member.summary: Return the parameter as string for printing etc.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Plist
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type Plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Plist.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Plist.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Plist
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to Plist.
member.param: the string value of the plist.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.LevelsCondition
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type levels.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.LevelsCondition.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.LevelsCondition.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.LevelsCondition
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to LevelsCondition.
member.param: the string value of the LevelsCondition.

member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type timing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.TimingCondition.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to TimingCondition.
member.param: the string value of the TimingCondition.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.File
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.File.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.File.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.File
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to File.
member.param: the string value of the file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.String
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.String.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.String.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.String
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to String parameter.
member.param: the string value of the parameter.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type integer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer)~System.Int32
member.summary: implicit cast operator from Integer param to int.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer.op_Implicit(System.Int32)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to Plist.
member.param: the int value of the Integer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Integer
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to Integer.
member.param: the string value of the Integer.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type unsigned integer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger)~System.UInt32
member.summary: implicit cast operator from UnsignedInteger to uint.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger.op_Implicit(System.UInt32)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger
member.summary: implicit cast operator from uint to UnsignedInteger.
member.param: the uint value of the parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.UnsignedInteger
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to UnsignedInteger.
member.param: the string value of the UnsignedInteger.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type double.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double)~System.Double
member.summary: implicit cast operator from Double parameter to double.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double.op_Implicit(System.Double)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double
member.summary: implicit cast operator from double to Double.
member.param: the double value of the parameter.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.Double
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to Double.
member.param: the string value of the plist.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type string as comma separated string values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to CommaSeparatedString.
member.param: the string value of the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString)~System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}
member.summary: implicit cast operator from CommaSeparatedString to list of string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString.ToList
member.summary: Convert the parameter to list of strings.
member.returns: the parameter's value as list of strings.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type string as comma separated double values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to CommaSeparatedDouble.
member.param: the string value of the CommaSeparatedDouble.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble)~System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double}
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to Plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedDouble.ToList
member.summary: Convert CommaSeparatedDouble parameter to list of double.
member.returns: the parameters value as list of doubles.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type string as comma separated int values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to CommaSeparatedInteger.
member.param: the string value of the plist.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger)~System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32}
member.summary: implicit cast operator from CommaSeparatedInteger to list of int.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedInteger.ToList
member.summary: Convert CommaSeparatedDouble parameter to list of double.
member.returns: the parameters value as list of doubles.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger
member.summary: Test Method parameter (PH) of type string as comma separated or ranges of int values.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger.op_Implicit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger)~System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32}
member.summary: implicit cast operator from CommaSeparatedRangeInteger to list of int. it allows definition like 1-9,10 or 1,3,5,7,6-0. No negative numbers.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger.op_Implicit(System.String)~Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedRangeInteger
member.summary: implicit cast operator from string to CommaSeparatedRangeInteger.
member.param: the string value of the plist.
